name: Username Avatar Top Menu
description: Show your avatar and display name in the GNOME top bar with optional hostname; CPU, RAM, swap, GPU, network, disk and temperature metrics; accessible tooltips; configurable devices, ordering, thresholds and polling; persistent manual, fullscreen, media and timed keep-awake modes; animated top-bar autohide; a quick settings user toggle; diagnostics; and desktop shortcuts for primary paste and three-finger middle click.
